allow: Bash(powershell -Command "[Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; python -c ""import zipfile; import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET; import sys; sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding=''utf-8''); z = zipfile.ZipFile(r''C:\Users\AnasAkil\Desktop\lucapellicari\2 - LUCA PELLICARI\1 - SITO LUCA - schema principale 21.11.25.docx''); xml_content = z.read(''word/document.xml''); tree = ET.fromstring(xml_content); print('' ''.join(t.text for t in tree.iter() if t.text))""")
